summary: Crystal‑clear recording captures an acoustic‑rich, B‑side heavy show with standout Touch of Grey and a superb The Other One.
review: Reviewers praise the mix for its clarity—bass, vocals and acoustic leads swirl together beautifully—with only two brief glitches noted. Musically the concert offers an unusual setlist that opens with Touch of Grey and delivers an exceptionally performed The Other One, making it a memorable night despite the unknown date.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on both performance and sound quality; minor glitch noted but overall excellent impression leads to a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear vocals, bass, acoustic soloing and heavy drum beats all swirl clearly; two tracks have a weird glitch but otherwise the recording is top‑notch.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Interesting B‑side‑heavy set list with abundant acoustic leads; opens with Touch of Grey and includes a classic, exceptionally performed The Other One.
